section_name: Use of certain moneys to pay for ignition interlock program
chapter_title: Driving Under the Influence of Intoxicants
text: Notwithstanding ORS 813.270 (Intoxicated Driver Program Fund) , moneys in the Intoxicated Driver Program Fund may be used to pay for administration and evaluation of the ignition interlock program established by ORS 813.600 (Ignition interlock program) to 813.616 (Use of certain moneys to pay for ignition interlock program) and for the costs of participation in the program for indigents. [1987 c.746 §8; 1993 c.382 §4]
markdown:
## Title 59
### Chapter 813. Driving Under the Influence of Intoxicants
##### § 813.616 — Use of certain moneys to pay for ignition interlock program

Notwithstanding ORS 813.270 (Intoxicated Driver Program Fund) , moneys in the Intoxicated Driver Program Fund may be used to pay for administration and evaluation of the ignition interlock program established by ORS 813.600 (Ignition interlock program) to 813.616 (Use of certain moneys to pay for ignition interlock program) and for the costs of participation in the program for indigents. [1987 c.746 §8; 1993 c.382 §4]

subsections.text: Notwithstanding ORS 813.270 (Intoxicated Driver Program Fund) , moneys in the Intoxicated Driver Program Fund may be used to pay for administration and evaluation of the ignition interlock program established by ORS 813.600 (Ignition interlock program) to 813.616 (Use of certain moneys to pay for ignition interlock program) and for the costs of participation in the program for indigents. [1987 c.746 §8; 1993 c.382 §4]
